_description: OECD CRS standard baseline rules. All jurisdiction files override these where local rules differ.

thresholds.pre_existing_individual_high_value: Exceeds USD 1,000,000 aggregate balance - triggers enhanced review
thresholds.pre_existing_entity_review_trigger: Exceeds USD 250,000 aggregate balance - triggers entity DD review
thresholds.new_accounts: No financial threshold - ALL new accounts undergo self-cert DD at opening

new_individual.procedure: Self-certification at account opening. Collect: full legal name, address, date of birth, jurisdiction(s) of tax residence, TIN(s) per jurisdiction.
new_individual.timetable: At or before account opening; must be obtained before account is operational
new_individual.validation: FI must confirm self-cert is reasonable in light of other information held (AML/KYC, source of funds)
new_individual.if_missing: Do not open account OR open as undocumented with 90-day cure period (jurisdiction-specific)

pre_existing_individual_lower_value.threshold: Aggregate balance USD 1,000,000 or below at 31 December of the prior year
pre_existing_individual_lower_value.procedure: Residence address test: current documented mailing/residence address from documentary evidence on file. Supplement with electronic search for indicia.
indicia: Standing instructions to pay to foreign country account
Currently effective power of attorney to foreign address
In-care-of or hold-mail address as sole address on file

pre_existing_individual_high_value.threshold: Aggregate balance exceeds USD 1,000,000 at 31 December of the review year
pre_existing_individual_high_value.procedure: Enhanced: full electronic AND paper file search including all customer accounts. Relationship manager enquiry. Annual re-check.
pre_existing_individual_high_value.relationship_manager_inquiry: Mandatory: RM must confirm if they have actual knowledge of account holder being a reportable person

new_entity.procedure: Self-certification for entity classification and controlling persons if Passive NFFE.

pre_existing_entity.threshold: Review triggered only if aggregate balance exceeds USD 250,000
pre_existing_entity.procedure: Classify entity using existing AML/KYC documentation. Obtain self-cert for Passive NFFEs to identify controlling persons.

types.Reporting_FI: A Financial Institution required to report under CRS in its jurisdiction of residence
types.Non_Reporting_FI: Specifically excluded FI (e.g. governmental entity, international org, certain pension funds)
types.Active_NFFE: NFE where majority income is active; < 50% passive income; < 50% passive assets. No look-through required.
types.Passive_NFFE: NFE that is not Active NFFE. Look-through to controlling persons required.
types.Wider_Approach_FI: FI that reports on all non-resident account holders regardless of whether jurisdiction is AEOI partner

controlling_person_types.CP_Individual_of_Legal_Person: Individual exercising ultimate effective control of a legal person - typically owns/controls >= 25%
controlling_person_types.CP_Individual_of_Legal_Arrangement_Trust: Other natural person exercising ultimate control
controlling_person_types.CP_Individual_of_Legal_Arrangement_Other: Natural person controlling a non-trust legal arrangement

message_spec.TransmittingCountry: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of FI
message_spec.ReceivingCountry: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of receiving competent authority

doc_spec.CorrDocRefId: Reference to original DocRefId being corrected (OECD2/OECD3)

correction_workflow.amend: DocTypeIndic OECD2; include CorrDocRefId referencing original DocRefId; submit full corrected account record
correction_workflow.void: DocTypeIndic OECD3; include CorrDocRefId referencing original DocRefId; used to delete a record entirely then refile with OECD1 if needed
correction_workflow.nil_report: MessageTypeIndic CRS703; CrsBody with no AccountReports elements

self_certification_forms.individual: Collect: tax residence jurisdictions, TINs per jurisdiction, date of birth, name, address. FI designs own form or uses OECD model.
self_certification_forms.entity: Collect: entity classification, tax residence, TIN, registered address. For Passive NFFE: also collect controlling persons.
self_certification_forms.validity: No statutory expiry under OECD standard; re-certification required on change of circumstances
self_certification_forms.change_of_circumstances: FI must treat new self-cert as invalid if any change of circumstances makes existing self-cert incorrect

data_retention_minimum: 5 years from end of reporting year (OECD recommendation; local law may require more)
